query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_colaboradores,
  SUM(CASE WHEN departamentoId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_departamento,
  SUM(CASE WHEN departamentoId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_departamento,
  SUM(CASE WHEN leaderId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_lider
FROM users
WHERE role = 'colaborador';
